title: "Welcome to Your Quarto Website"
---
title: "StatiX AI & Data Labs"
description: "Learn practical, industry-aligned technical skills."
---

::: {.hero}
# StatiX AI & Data Labs

Welcome — a curated collection of hands-on tutorials and guides for data, AI and programming.

Click any tile below to open the corresponding tutorial.
:::

---

<style>
.tech-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr)); gap: 1rem; }
.tech-card { background:#fff; border-radius:8px; padding:1.0rem; box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center; min-height:120px; display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;}
.tech-card a{ color:inherit; text-decoration:none; }
.tech-logo { font-size:36px; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
.tech-name { font-size:16px; font-weight:600; }
.hero img.flyer { max-width:320px; border-radius:8px; margin-top:1rem; }
</style>

<div class="tech-grid">
	<div class="tech-card"><a href="python.qmd"><div class="tech-logo">Py</div><div class="tech-name">Python</div></a></div>
	<div class="tech-card"><a href="r.qmd"><div class="tech-logo">R</div><div class="tech-name">R Programming</div></a></div>
	<div class="tech-card"><a href="clinical-r.qmd"><div class="tech-logo">CR</div><div class="tech-name">Clinical R</div></a></div>
	<div class="tech-card"><a href="nextflow.qmd"><div class="tech-logo">NF</div><div class="tech-name">Nextflow</div></a></div>
	<div class="tech-card"><a href="quarto_tutorial_for_beginners.qmd"><div class="tech-logo">Q</div><div class="tech-name">Quarto</div></a></div>
	<div class="tech-card"><a href="r-shiny.qmd"><div class="tech-logo">RS</div><div class="tech-name">R Shiny</div></a></div>
	<div class="tech-card"><a href="statistics.qmd"><div class="tech-logo">Σ</div><div class="tech-name">Statistics</div></a></div>
	<div class="tech-card"><a href="ml-ai.qmd"><div class="tech-logo">AI</div><div class="tech-name">ML &amp; AI</div></a></div>
</div>

---

### About the collection

This site collects independent tutorials. Each tile links to a standalone page with hands-on examples and runnable code. If you want, send me high-resolution logos or the flyer image and I will replace the text tiles with branded images.

---

Want a different order or additional pages? Tell me which tutorials to prioritize and I will add them.
